rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §39.261 establishes an awards system for schools and has no operative relationship to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The Texas Successful Schools Awards System is created to recognize and reward those schools and school districts that demonstrate progress or success in achieving the education goals of the state.
_note: Rule text concerns school awards system creation; no fiscal or operational linkage to homestead exemption amounts.
